title: make vendor: run `tidy` after `vendor`
body:
Run `go mod tidy` after `go mod vendor` to properly clean up the
dependencies.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

#### What type of PR is this?

 /kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Cleans up the dependencies.

#### How to verify it

Run `go mod tidy` locally and notice that nothing changes anymore.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Do we really need this template in Buildah? We don't seem to use/enforce it much.
